title: dupatya alpina
intro: Dupatya alpina, also known as Himalayan sweet touch or Himalayan sweet honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of dupatya alpina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural pain reliever. Dupatya alpina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
